sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand recognition but have limited direct impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $120M contract with a national agency adds significant, reliable revenue for Ilval Financial.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
